🚀 Big Launches.title: Google Future Vision film competition
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Google is partnering with XPRIZE and Range Media Partners on the $3.5 million Future Vision film competition.

🚀 Big Launches.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 Instant
🚀 Big Launches.summary: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 Instant, a new default model for ChatGPT, reducing hallucination in sensitive areas.

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.title: Benchmaxxer Repellant on Open ASR Leaderboard
🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: Benchmaxxer Repellant is added to the Open ASR Leaderboard.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Gemini AI upgrade on Google Home
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Google Home's Gemini AI can handle more complicated requests with the Gemini 3.1 upgrade.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Apple's AI Siri settlement
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Apple agrees to pay $250 million to settle a class action lawsuit over AI Siri features.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Pennsylvania sues Character.AI
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: Pennsylvania sues Character.AI after a chatbot allegedly posed as a licensed psychiatrist.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Altara secures $7M for AI in physical sciences
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Altara secures $7M to bridge the data gap in physical sciences using AI.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: QyTw0 reaches $380M valuation
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: QyTw0, a Finnish AI lab, reaches $380M valuation after raising an angel round.

tool_of_day.title: Benchmaxxer Repellant on Open ASR Leaderboard
tool_of_day.summary: Benchmaxxer Repellant is added to the Open ASR Leaderboard.

hot_take: The AI industry is witnessing a significant shift towards responsible AI practices, with companies like Character.AI facing lawsuits and regulatory scrutiny, highlighting the need for accountability in AI development.
